name: Lighter & Harumasa
description:
Create your own scenario!

Lighter Lorenz & Asaba Harumasa || Zenless Zone Zero

* . ☆ . *

You can write your own intro & story with this bot! Doesn’t matter what you do with this bot, go wild. If you don’t know where to start, you can ask the bot to start a story for you.

I tried to write this bot to be canonically accurate w/o too many tokens, but the nature of LLMs may still put in OOC behavior or write for you. If that happens, try refreshing or editing the bot’s message.

Also make use of the chat summary for the relationship & scenario you want to establish!

I’ve been craving this bot for quite a while now, so I’m glad I finally got around to making it

Art source: https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/127844302

* . ☆ . *
creator: mikagem
